reference: I underwent Intracytoplasmic Sperm Injection for primary male infertility, but I resulted in a chemical pregnancy, which made all of us disappointed. We are planning to go for a second try during February to March two thousand and twelve. I have no problems and my health responds well to all the medications. What is the success rate for our second try?
text: I underwent intracytoplasmic sperm injection for primary male infertility, but I resulted in a chemical pregnancy, which made all of us disappointed. We are planning to go for a second try during February to March 2012. I have no problems, and my health responds well to all the medications. What is the success rate for our second try?
